zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham於大約1400年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Robert Laynham41歲，母親Alice Millicent Hende41歲。她和Sir John William Smythe至少有5個兒子。她去世於1447年在英國英格蘭艾可利文哈爾享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可利文哈爾。

nameMeanings.name: Laingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Van Laningham  , a surname of Flemish origin (see   Van Landingham  ).

variants.name: Van Laningham
meanings: Variant of   Van Landingham  , a surname of Flemish origin.

nameMeanings.name: Millicent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Melisende, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from amal ‘labour’ + swinth ‘strength’. This was the name of a daughter of Charlemagne. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham was born about 1400, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Laynham, was 41 and her mother, Alice Millicent Hende, was 41. She had at least 5 sons with Sir John William Smythe. She died in 1447, in Rivenhall, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Rivenhall, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham est née environ 1400, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Laynham, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice Millicent Hende, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils avec Sir John William Smythe. Elle est décédée en 1447, à Rivenhall, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Rivenhall, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham um 1400 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Laynham 41 und ihre Mutter Alice Millicent Hende 41. Sie hatte mit Sir John William Smythe mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1447 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Rivenhall, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Rivenhall, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham è nata il circa 1400 nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Laynham, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Alice Millicent Hende, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli con Sir John William Smythe. Morì nel 1447, nel Rivenhall, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Rivenhall, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Millicent Elizabeth Lainghamが約1400年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Laynhamは41歳，母Alice Millicent Hendeは41歳であった。彼女はSir John William Smytheとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1447年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリベンハルで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスリベンハルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Laynham(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Millicent Hende(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Sir John William Smythe(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1447년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 라이븐홀에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 라이븐홀에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham родилась около 1400 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Laynham было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Millicent Hende, 41. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Sir John William Smythe. Она умерла в 1447 г. в местности ривенолл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности ривенолл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
